title: A Frost Fancy
content:
Summer gone,
    Winter here;
    Ways are white,
    Skies are clear.
    And the sun
    A ruddy boy
    All day sliding,
    While at night
    The stars appear
    Like skaters gliding
    On a mere.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Le Gallienne delivers a powerful performance in "A Frost Fancy"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
